response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience with the mandatory C++ on Windows and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise. Their profile is more aligned with full-stack and web technologies, which may not fully align with the core requirements of this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with software development best practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming).
Strong communication skills and experience presenting at workshops/conferences.
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages and frameworks.
concerns: No explicit mention of C++ development on Windows (mandatory skill).
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains.
Recent roles focus heavily on TypeScript/Node.js, which may not translate directly to this role.
